# cortexcloud_cwp_policy (Resource)

Manages a Cloud Workload Protection (CWP) policy. 

CWP policies help prevent and manage security violations in cloud runtime instances by applying detection logic to specific asset groups at desired SDLC stages.

Note: When this resource is deleted, any issues connected to the deleted policy will NOT be closed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cortexcloud_cwp_policy" "example" {
  name             = "Example CWP Policy"
  description      = "Example Cloud Workload Protection policy"
  type             = "COMPLIANCE"
  evaluation_stage = "RUNTIME"
  asset_group_ids  = [1, 2, 3]
  policy_rules = [
    {
      rule_id  = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000011"
      action   = "ISSUE"
      severity = "HIGH"
    },
    {
      rule_id  = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000302"
      action   = "PREVENT"
      severity = "LOW"
    }
  ]
  remediation_guidance = "Review and remediate the identified issues."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `asset_group_ids` (List of Number) The IDs of the asset groups that this policy applies to.
- `evaluation_stage` (String) The evaluation stage for the policy. Possible values are: "CI", "RUNTIME", "DEPLOY", "".
- `name` (String) The name of the CWP policy.
- `policy_rules` (Attributes List) The CWP rules attached to the policy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policy_rules))
- `type` (String) The policy's type. Possible values are: "COMPLIANCE", "MALWARE", "SECRET", "".

### Optional

- `asset_scope` (String) The asset scope in blob form (base64 encoded).
- `condition` (String) The condition in blob form (base64 encoded). Required for non-compliance policies.
- `description` (String) The description of the CWP policy.
- `evaluation_modes` (List of String) The evaluation modes for the policy.
- `exception` (String) The exception in blob form (base64 encoded).
- `remediation_guidance` (String) Remediation guidance for the policy.

### Read-Only

- `action` (String) The policy's action. 

This will be set according to the actions configured for the attached rules. The "Prevent" action takes precedence over the "Issue" action.
- `asset_groups` (List of String) The asset group names (computed from asset_group_ids).
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the policy was created. Note: Due to an API limitation, this value may change when the policy is updated.
- `created_by` (String) The user who created the policy. Note: Due to an API limitation, this field may be empty for policies created via the API.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the policy is disabled. Note: This field is read-only because the API does not currently honor this value on create or update operations.
- `id` (String) The ID of the CWP policy.
- `modified_at` (String) The timestamp when the policy was last modified.
- `revision` (Number) The revision number of the policy.
- `severity` (String) The policy's severity level. 

This will be set according to the highest severity level in the attached rules.

<a id="nestedatt--policy_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policy_rules`

Required:

- `action` (String) The CWP rule's action. Possible values are: "ISSUE", "PREVENT", "NULL".
- `rule_id` (String) The ID of the CWP rule.
- `severity` (String) The severity of the CWP rule.

Optional:

- `user_remediation_guidance` (String) The procedure to remediate the issue captured by the CWP rule.

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The policy rule's ID.

This value differs from the rule_id value, which is the unique ID of the individual CWP rule.
- `policy_id` (String) The ID of the underlying policy.
- `policy_revision` (Number) The revision of the underlying policy.
- `remediation_guidance` (String) The remediation steps for the underlying policy.
- `rule_name` (String) The name of the CWP rule.
